name: @elizaos/python
description: elizaOS Core - Python runtime and types

scripts.build:
python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import json; Path('elizaos.egg-info').mkdir(exist_ok=True); Path('elizaos.egg-info/PKG-INFO').write_text('Metadata-Version: 2.1
Name: elizaos
Version: 1.0.0
'); print('✅ Build completed - egg-info created')"
scripts.test: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && python3 -m venv "$tmpdir" && "$tmpdir/bin/python" -m pip install -e '.[dev]' -q && "$tmpdir/bin/python" -m pytest; status=$?; rm -rf "$tmpdir"; exit $status
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check --fix --unsafe-fixes . && uv run ruff format .
scripts.lint:fix: uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format .

author: elizaOS
